name: WhatsApp Off-Platform Redirect via Travel Excuse
description: Scammer uses a travel excuse to redirect project scope discussion to WhatsApp, avoiding platform monitoring

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: I saw your gig and I love it. I have a big project but let's discuss on WhatsApp first (+1-555-0192).

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: I prefer to keep discussions on Fiverr. What is the project about?

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: I travel a lot and lose access to Fiverr. We can do the contract here but discuss the real scope privately so I can share the full budget freely.

red_flags: Travel excuse to justify off-platform communication
